internal_issues.description: Wrong DOI for Cummer 2000 in SEC-6.2. Used IEE Proceedings DOI instead of IEEE Trans. Antennas Propag.

HOL-HIERARCHY: No organizing principle stated for why parts 3-5 are in that order or why kill-shots represent higher-tier evidence. Assigned EXP-091.
KILLSHOT-GAIA: Missing explicit error analysis for parallax inconsistency claim. Need to compute expected dome parallax from geometry. Assigned EXP-092.
SEC-2b.7-rewrite.c2: Unverified claim about dome removing structured scoreboard 2026-04-10 to 2026-04-11 without citing specific archived before/after state.
Kill Shots Test 3 cites AI Context Rule 15, but AI Context page is 404 (2nd consecutive poll). Cannot verify rule exists in current dome content.
SEC-4.1 (9.2-Sigma dashboard) Polaris bottom-line contradicts table entry. Assigned EXP-095.
